subLocations.name: Guadosalam
subLocations.prose: Mostly story — Seymour's feast, the Farplane, and the proposal. Explore the winding backstreets before entering the red double doors; there are chests with a Mega-Potion, Elixir, and 3,000 gil tucked around the western room, plus Primer XIII on the floor. In the corridor leading to the Farplane, check the left wall for a hidden chest with Lightning Marbles. On the Farplane itself, speak to Wakka and Lulu to trigger their scenes — this upgrades the Brotherhood with Strength +10%, Sensor, and Waterstrike.
